privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is largely synthetic and derived from specific scenario parameters defined in the prompt. Verified that the expected boundaries for the simulation results (CF from 22-35%, LCOE from $20-$80/MWh, AEP from 90,000-160,000 MWh) accurately match the verifier's hardcoded logic. Verified the usage of Pvsamv1 module, the specific site coordinates (lat 34.867, lon -116.783), and the PPA price ($35/MWh) exactly match the instructions in the prompt. The simulation leverages real meteorological data via SAM's bundled Daggett TMY weather file from the NSRDB.
